source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A certain transformer has a primary-to-secondary coil turns ratio of 55:9. The voltage applied to the primary coil varies according to the pattern shown in the <image>, and the secondary coil is connected to a load. Which of the following statements is correct?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The RMS value of the AC power supply is 220V, and the frequency is 50Hz

choice_map.C: The input-to-output power ratio of the transformer is 55:9
choice_map.D: The RMS value of the AC power supply is 220V, and the frequency is 50Hz
